## `r ctry`

### Row {height=20%}

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Stage (SDG 15.9.1b)"
meta <- country_meta |> filter(`Country or area` == ctry)
stage <- meta$stage_label
list(icon = "award", color = unname(stage_palette[stage]), value = stage)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Compiled Accounts"
n_comp <- afe2025 |>
  filter(`Country or area` == ctry, Compiled == "Yes") |>
  nrow()
list(icon = "check2-square", color = "#219ebc", value = n_comp)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Data Source"
imputed <- meta$`Imputed data`
list(
  icon = "database",
  color = "#8ecae6",
  value = if_else(imputed == "Yes", "Imputed", "Self-reported")
)
```

### Row {height=15%}

```{r}
#| title: "Institution"
inst <- meta$`Responding institution`
website <- meta$`Website(s)`
links <- meta$Links
txt <- paste0("**Responding institution:** ", inst)
if (!is.na(website) && nzchar(website)) {
  txt <- paste0(txt, "  \n**Website:** ", website)
}
if (!is.na(links) && nzchar(links)) {
  txt <- paste0(txt, "  \n**Links:** ", links)
}
cat(txt)
```

### Row {height=65%}

#### Col {width=50%}

```{r}
#| title: !expr paste("Accounts compiled,", ctry)
#| fig-width: 5
#| fig-height: 5
ctry_data <- afe2025 |>
  filter(`Country or area` == ctry) |>
  mutate(
    grp_short = group_short[`Account Group`],
    Account = str_wrap(Account, 35),
    Account = fct_reorder(Account, Compiled == "Yes", .fun = sum)
  )

ggplot(ctry_data, aes(y = Account, fill = Compiled)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "count", width = 0.6) +
  facet_grid(
    rows = vars(grp_short),
    scales = "free_y",
    space = "free_y",
    switch = "y"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Yes" = "#219ebc", "No" = "#eeeeee"),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 0:1, labels = c("No", "Yes")) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
  theme(
    strip.text.y.left = element_text(
      angle = 0,
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold",
      size = 8
    ),
    strip.placement = "outside",
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )
```

#### Col {width=50%}

```{r}
#| title: !expr paste("Compiled accounts,", ctry)
tbl_data <- afe2025 |>
  filter(`Country or area` == ctry, Compiled == "Yes") |>
  select(`Account Group`, Account)

if (nrow(tbl_data) > 0) {
  tbl_data |>
    gt() |>
    cols_label(`Account Group` = "Group", Account = "Account") |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
      locations = cells_column_labels()
    ) |>
    tab_options(table.width = pct(100), data_row.padding = px(4))
} else {
  gt(tibble(Note = paste("No accounts compiled for", ctry, ".")))
}
```
